info.title: ZipUtil
info.description: A CLI for nested zip file extractor

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: CommandLineApplication.Parse, OK: CommandLineApplication.Execute, OK: CommandLineApplication.ExecuteAsync, OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole, String), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IHelpTextGenerator, IConsole, String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: <<<-----A CLI for nested zip file extractor----->>>

options.name: --delete
options.description: Delete all zip files after extraction

options.name: -n
options.description: By default files are overwritten on extraction if there is any. Use this option to disable this

arguments.name: Either relative or absolute path of zip file
